{{CargoRelic
|name=Lycoris
|class_id=20149
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=The flower only blooms every one thousand years and never at the same time as the leaves! Such are those who seek true love, always searching and never finding. As years go by, their heart stays passionate, yet as fate would have it, mutual love is hard to find!
|fame=17
|art=29
|fth=16
|civ=16
|tech=12
|ss1=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +3<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +5<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +7<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +7<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Per partner you have, Snail ATK +7<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
